name: Thankgiving Dressing
recipeIngredient: 3 cups White Bread (1/2 inch cubes), about 6-11 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
3. In another bowl, whisk together milk, vegetable oil, and beaten egg with the dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square baking pan coated with cooking spray (Pam). Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Cool the cornbread on a wire rack and crumble it.
6. In a large skillet, melt margarine over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and water; cover and cook for 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
7. Remove from heat and stir in poultry seasoning, sage, salt, and white bread cubes.
8. Combine the crumbled cornbread, vegetable mixture, chicken broth, parsley, and egg in a large bowl. Stir well.
9. Transfer the mixture to a 2-quart casserole coated with Pam (vegetable non-stick spray). Bake uncovered at 325°F (165°C) for 35 minutes.
